title: neottia salassia
intro: Neottia salassia, also known as the Salassia orchid or Salassia neottia, is a rare and endangered terrestrial orchid native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine, valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Neottia salassia include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Neottia salassia is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
